_publications._publicationTitle: FAP expression as a marker of malignant transformation enabling in vivo characterization in peripheral nerve sheath tumors: a multimodal and translational study.

_contextSnippet: we consistently observed strong FAP expression in cancer-associated fibroblasts in multiple solid carcinomas, serving as an internal positive control
details: Successfully demonstrated strong FAP expression in cancer-associated fibroblasts in multiple solid carcinomas serving as internal positive control
